text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing a training session with Inari
One...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We done already? Ya sure you're not missin'
something? I'm still burstin' with energy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Boss! Don't be stingy. Lemme run some
more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Boss! Don't be stingy. Lemme run some
more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What're you talkin' 'bout? Us Edo folk don't
waste time savin' our leg strength for tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Inari! Inari! Are you still running?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hey there, Turbo. Wazzup?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I've still got energy to burn, so I wanna run some
more!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It feels amazing to run until you're exhausted! Just
the other day, I ran so hard that I fell asleep as
soon as I stopped!
choice_data_list: Are you sure you didn't just pass out?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Fussin' over semantics is a bad look! Floor it
till you run outta gas! Ya got some real Edo spirit,
Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll join ya for a li'l run! I can't sit quietly lettin' you
be the only stylin' racer here!
choice_data_list: As your trainer, I can't let that slide either!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right! I knew you'd come 'round!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right, Turbo! Let's run, partner!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: You betcha! Let's run, run, RUN!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait, Turbo! Don't just run off by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One happily runs with Twin Turbo until the
sun falls below the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Ya know what? I respect that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Ya know what? I respect that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The way ya stay true to yourself is really
somethin' else! Ya must really believe in your
ideas!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya got guts, so I'll let ya off the hook! Let's wrap
up today's special trainin' session!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you're not gonna run more? Aw, I was
looking forward to a real match! That sucks!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout we swing by a sweets shop and have a
dango eatin' contest instead? Nothin' beats sweet
treats when you're feelin' tired!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: You're on! I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're as adorable as ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One speaks with a satisfied look on her face
as she heads out with Twin Turbo.
